empleos.descripcion: I’m helping Scale Mediation find a top candidate to join their team full-time for the role of Full-Stack Developer. You will shape the future of our SaaS product by owning end-to-end engineering delivery. Compensation: USD 2.5K - 5K/month Location: Remote (specific timezones) Mission of Scale Mediation: "To empower mediators with an all-in-one platform that simplifies case management, streamlines operations, and helps grow their practice." What makes you a strong candidate: You are an expert in React.js, Full-stack development, Engineering. You are proficient in UX/UI, Testing, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, SQL. English - Conversational Responsibilities and more: Opportunity: - This is a chance to grow into a founding engineer role at Scale Mediation. - You will be our third engineer, working directly with the founder to own end-to-end delivery of features that shape our SaaS product, from UI/UX design through database implementation to shipping. Requirements: - 5+ years building full-stack SaaS products. - Strong proficiency in React, JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS. - Hands-on experience with Supabase (Postgres, auth, storage, edge functions) and Axios for API integration. - Strong eye for UI/UX with the ability to design features end-to-end. - Comfortable writing SQL, designing schemas, and testing your own work. - Solid understanding of REST APIs and Git. Responsibilities: - Own full end-to-end delivery of features, from UI/UX design through database implementation to shipping. - Build and maintain full-stack functionality spanning React/Tailwind front end to Supabase/Postgres back end. - Design schemas, queries, and edge functions. - Integrate front-end and back-end via REST APIs using Axios. - Test your own work before handoff. - Work directly with the

El candidato ideal siente pasión por el desarrollo de software, disfruta resolver problemas complejos y tiene experiencia trabajando con tecnologías modernas para crear aplicaciones completas. Colaborarás estrechamente con diseñadores, gerentes de producto y otros ingenieros para desarrollar soluciones innovadoras que ofrezcan una excelente experiencia de usuario. Diseñar y administrar bases de datos y garantizar su rendimiento y escalabilidad. Colaborar con equipos de diseño, producto y desarrollo para implementar nuevas funcionalidades. empleos.descripcion: About Flatiron is a global remote software development company with engineers located around the world. We unite experts from diverse backgrounds and experiences in a collaborative culture to deliver exceptional products and services for our clients. As a forward-thinking software engineering company, we provide industry-leading solutions to complex problems in both the US and the UK. Operating in a fast-paced, agile environment, we specialize in software consulting for our clients. We offer a stimulating and rewarding environment for our team members. We value innovation, continuous learning, and professional growth, and we strive to create a workplace where everyone can thrive. Join us at Flatiron and be a part of a team that is shaping the future of software development. Job Summary This is a full-time fully remote working opportunity where you will be working as part of a Scrum team which requires working closely with other software engineers, stakeholders and contributors on the project. Working with respect to the US timezone is a requirement for the position. Attending meetings, being actively involved in the decision making process and collaborating with all of these stakeholders are essential parts of this position. Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, high-performance full stack applications with a strong emphasis on backend architecture. Lead and contribute to the integration of AI/ML features into products, collaborating closely with data scientists and engineers. Develop robust backend services and APIs using Python or Node.js (Express, NestJS). Contribute to frontend development using React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript practices. empleos.descripcion: Full-Stack Software Engineer About the Opportunity We are looking for a Full-Stack Software Engineer to join a fast-growing technology company building a high-scale digital platform used by hundreds of thousands of users. This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys taking full ownership of features—from concept to production—and is comfortable working across frontend, backend, and data layers. You'll collaborate with cross-functional teams to build scalable products, improve platform reliability, and contribute to an engineering culture focused on quality, automation, and continuous delivery. Key Responsibilities End-to-End Feature Ownership Design, develop, test, and deploy features across the full technology stack. Own services, APIs, frontend components, and system integrations from planning through production. Ensure applications are scalable, reliable, secure, accessible, and maintainable. Full-Stack Development Build backend services using modern Node.js frameworks. Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces for web and mobile applications. Design APIs and database models that support long-term scalability. Collaborate closely with Product, Design, QA, and DevOps teams throughout the development lifecycle. Engineering Excellence Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. Implement unit, integration, and end-to-end tests. Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices. Continuously improve application performance, reliability, and developer experience. Reduce technical debt through thoughtful refactoring and architecture improvements. empleos.descripcion: About The Client The client is a specialized business consultancy and software integration firm that bridges the gap between financial operations and cloud workflow ecosystems. They focus heavily on building automated business applications, custom integrations, and deep data connections for platforms like Monday.com and financial suites like Xero. By turning complex operational workflows into seamless cloud applications, they help businesses scale efficiently, automate manual data entry, and establish a single source of truth for their operational data. Role Overview We are seeking an experienced React Developer to join a growing product development team focused on enhancing an existing application within the Monday.com ecosystem. Rather than building a product from scratch, you will work on an established Monday.com Marketplace app, developing new features, improving existing functionality, and helping accelerate the product roadmap. You'll collaborate closely with an experienced development team in a fast-paced environment where quality, speed, and ownership are equally important. The ideal candidate is a strong React developer who enjoys solving real-world product challenges, is comfortable working across APIs and cloud infrastructure, and can quickly contribute to an existing codebase with minimal onboarding. Full time: 40 hours per week Remote: Fully remote (client based in Sydney, Australia) Engagement Type: Independent Contractor Monthly Rate: $1600~ (based on a 40-hour workweek; flexible depending on experience) Key Responsibilities: Product & Front-End Evolution: Develop new features and enhancements for an existing Monday.com Marketplace application. Build responsive, scalable user interfaces using React, maintaining clean, reusable, and highly maintainable co

empleos.descripcion: Job Overview We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Administrative Assistant to support daily office operations. The ideal candidate will handle administrative tasks, manage schedules, maintain records, and ensure smooth communication within the organization. This role requires strong organizational, communication, and multitasking skills. Preferred Skills Experience with office management software or administrative tools. Familiarity with document management systems. Basic knowledge of bookkeeping or HR administrative tasks. Strong interpersonal skills and team collaboration. Benefits and Perks Competitive salary. Health and medical benefits. Paid time off and public holidays. Professional development and training opportunities. Supportive and collaborative work environment. Opportunities for career advancement. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Key Responsibilities Provide administrative support to managers and team members. Manage calendars, schedule meetings, and coordinate appointments. Prepare and edit documents, reports, and presentations. Answer phone calls, respond to emails, and handle correspondence. Maintain and organize office files, records, and databases. Coordinate office activities, meetings, and company events. Assist with travel arrangements and expense reports. Order and manage office supplies and equipment. Support HR or finance departments with basic administrative tasks when needed. Ensure o

About the role: This role involves translating structured corporate advice into clear, accessible digital interfaces. As a Junior Web Designer, you will ensure our digital touchpoints reflect the precision and clarity of our firm's consulting work. What You Will Do Produce wireframes and high-fidelity mockups for specialized client portals and corporate websites. Collaborate with principals to simplify complex financial data and organizational structures. Maintain and update project-specific assets for our Manchester-based clients. Ensure design elements align with the firm's focus on logical rigor. Contribute to the development of design systems for diverse holding companies. What We Are Looking For Basic familiarity with design software (Figma, Sketch, or Adobe Creative Suite). Understanding of typography, layout, and visual hierarchy. Ability to explain the logic behind design decisions in plain English. Strong organizational skills for a fully remote environment. A willingness to learn the intricacies of financial and corporate sectors. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Full Stack, React, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL, JavaScript
empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build interactive browser-based applications within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks, backend APIs, databases, and shipping interactive web products end-to-end. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

empleos.descripcion: Estamos buscando un Desarrollador Backend altamente capacitado y orientado al detalle para unirse a nuestro equipo. En este puesto, serás responsable de desarrollar, mantener y optimizar aplicaciones del lado del servidor, bases de datos y APIs que respalden sistemas escalables y de alto rendimiento. El candidato ideal siente pasión por el desarrollo de software, la resolución de problemas y la creación de soluciones backend confiables que impulsen experiencias de usuario fluidas. Trabajarás en estrecha colaboración con desarrolladores frontend, equipos de producto y otros ingenieros para diseñar e implementar aplicaciones eficientes, seguras y escalables. Esta posición requiere una sólida experiencia técnica, pensamiento analítico y la capacidad de desenvolverse eficazmente en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo. Diseñar y administrar APIs, bases de datos y la arquitectura de las aplicaciones. Crear sistemas y servicios escalables, seguros y de alto rendimiento. Colaborar con desarrolladores frontend y equipos multidisciplinarios para integrar componentes orientados al usuario. Escribir código limpio, eficiente y fácil de mantener, siguiendo las mejores prácticas de desarrollo. Diagnosticar, depurar y resolver problemas relacionados con el backend y cuellos de botella de rendimiento. Optimizar consultas a bases de datos y el rendimiento de las aplicaciones. Implementar buenas prácticas de seguridad y protección de datos. Participar en procesos de pruebas, despliegue y revisión de código. Mantener documentación técnica y contribuir a la mejora continua de los sistemas. Habilidades y Experiencia Requeridas Experiencia comprobada como Desarrollador Backend

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Front End, JavaScript, Git
empleos.descripcion: We are looking for a highly skilled Front-End Engineer with strong expertise in React and Next.js to build and maintain enterprise-grade web applications. The ideal candidate has experience developing scalable, data-intensive platforms, understands how front-end applications interact with APIs and authentication systems, and is comfortable working in a fully remote, English-speaking environment. Requirements 6+ years of professional experience with React (8+ years if no Bachelor's degree). Strong hands-on experience with React Hooks, Functional Components, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). Proven experience with Next.js, including SSR, CSR, routing, and environment-based configurations. Experience consuming secure REST APIs using JWT, OAuth, or similar authentication methods. Strong understanding of RBAC and authorization concepts. Experience optimizing front-end performance and working with large datasets. Proficiency with Git workflows, pull requests, and code reviews. Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). Ability to work independently while maintaining visibility and accountability in a remote environment. Dedicated to delivering exceptional service and maintaining organized business operations, our company is seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Data Entry File Clerk to join our team. If you excel at managing records, entering data accurately, and working independently in a remote environment, this opportunity may be the perfect fit for you. In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining digital files, updating databases, organizing administrative records, and ensuring information is entered accurately and efficiently. Your attention to detail, reliability, and commitment to data accuracy will play an important role in supporting daily operations and helping our team stay organized and productive. Â Key responsibilities: Â Intake & indexing. Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders. Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments. Index each record using standard metadata (client/project ID, date, document category, version, region). Â Document organization. Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures. Convert formats when needed (PDF merge/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling). Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags. Â Quality control Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans. Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes. Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework. Â Records governance & compliance Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality. Follow retention schedules, legal hold instructions, and deletion/archival rules. Support audits by pulling records quickly and documenting
